title: Urban Greening Trend Hotspot Analysis
author: Cleo Young
thumbnail_alt_text: Hex bin map showing hot & cold spots related to greening trends in the twin cities region.
popup_alt_text: Hex bin map showing hot & cold spots related to greening trends in the twin cities region with legend.
description: A fully reproducible ArcPy workflow for creating meaningful hotspot analyses of rasters, in particular those that show trends in land cover change over time. Users can batch process datasets and iteratively test which aggregation and analysis parameters best reflect the spatial scale of the dataset's trends. To demonstrate the tool, I produced a hotspot analysis of urban greening trends in the 7-county Twin Cities metro area, based on LandTrendr data generously shared by my labmate and colleague Celia Cortopassi.
